summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DTE is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $137.49. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 55.6%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $151.16 and a significant trendline confluence around $150.67 (formed by 4 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
